\tzpentry{ID5532}{Lagrangian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5532 introduces Lagrangian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{L}_{\rm eq} = \partial_t^2 - c^2 \partial_x^2 - c^2 \partial_y^2 + \beta\,y\,\partial_x. \end{equation}
